---
id: get-spaces
title: "List Spaces"
description: "List all child spaces under the specified parent space. Optionally include the parent space itself to flexibly meet diverse hierarchical querying needs."
sidebar_label: "List Spaces"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: versioned_docs/version-Beta/aqara-developer/data-export-api/data-export-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List Spaces"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/spaces"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



List all child spaces under the specified parent space. Optionally include the parent space itself to flexibly meet diverse hierarchical querying needs.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"parentSpaceId","in":"query","description":"Parent space ID. If empty, the response will return all top-level spaces (spaces without a parent, i.e., root nodes of the space tree).","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string"}},{"name":"needChildren","in":"query","description":"Whether to query for child spaces under the parent space. If parentSpaceId is not empty and needChildren is false, child spaces will not be returned (the parent space itself may be returned only when needParentSpaceSelf is true).","required":false,"schema":{"type":"boolean","default":true}},{"name":"needParentSpaceSelf","in":"query","description":"Whether to include the parent space itself (corresponding to parentSpaceId). This takes effect only if parentSpaceId is not empty.","required":false,"schema":{"type":"boolean","default":false}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
